creator: gerard@seibercom.net
text:
I am unable to update py26-BitTorrent-core-5.2.0_3,1 to version 5.2.0_4,1. The build crashes immediately. I have attemped to 
build the port several times over the past few days. The ports system on my machine is current and I have removed all entries from the 
'distfiles' directory before attempting to build the port.

A copy of the last build attempt is attached.

How-To-Repeat: 	Attempt to build the port.
